## Module Organization

<!-- Detected by /bootstrap Phase 1e — Agents MUST follow this when creating new modules -->

### Entry Point Archetype
<!-- Barrel Entry Point / Package Init / Package Root Class / Direct Import -->

### Convention
<!-- Mỗi module/feature expose public API qua entry point như thế nào -->

### Entry Point File
<!-- index.ts / __init__.py / MainClass.java / ... -->

### Import Rule
<!-- ✅ import { X } from '@/features/auth'        — đúng, qua entry point -->
<!-- ❌ import { X } from '@/features/auth/utils'  — sai, deep import -->

### Example
```
<!-- Ví dụ thực tế từ codebase -->
feature/
  components/
  hooks/
  services/
  index.ts    ← entry point, re-export public API
```
